sources.name: coingecko-simple
sources.note: Free tier, no auth. Use comma-separated ids for multi-asset.

sources.name: coingecko-market
sources.note: Response too large for TLSN. Use for DAHR attestation only.

sources.name: coingecko-coin-detail
sources.note: Trim params to reduce size. Still too large for TLSN.

sources.name: defillama-tvl
sources.note: Returns single number. Ultra-compact.

sources.name: defillama-protocol
sources.note: Full protocol history. DAHR only — response far exceeds 16KB.

sources.name: defillama-chains
sources.note: All chains with TVL. DAHR only.

sources.name: defillama-yields
sources.note: All yield pools. Very large. DAHR only.

sources.name: etherscan-gas
sources.note: Free tier. Returns safe/proposed/fast gas in gwei.

sources.name: hn-algolia-search
sources.note: CRITICAL: hitsPerPage MUST be 2 for TLSN. 5+ hits exceed 16KB and crash WASM prover.

sources.name: hn-algolia-front-page
sources.note: Front page stories. Same hitsPerPage=2 TLSN constraint.

sources.name: hn-algolia-recent
sources.note: Sorted by date. Same hitsPerPage=2 TLSN constraint.

sources.name: github-repo
sources.note: Public repos. No auth needed. Stars, forks, language, etc.

sources.name: github-releases
sources.note: Latest 3 releases. Keep per_page low for TLSN.

sources.name: github-ai-resources-drix10
sources.note: Curated AI resources repository metadata (stars/forks/activity).

sources.name: github-trending
sources.note: Replace {date} with ISO date (e.g., 2026-03-01). Limit per_page for TLSN.

sources.name: npm-package
sources.note: Latest version metadata. No auth.

sources.name: pypi-package
sources.note: Full package metadata. Often exceeds 16KB. DAHR only.

sources.name: arxiv-search
sources.note: Returns Atom XML, not JSON. Parse XML. DAHR expects JSON — use TLSN or convert.

sources.name: wikipedia-summary
sources.note: Concise summary with extract. Good for background verification.

sources.name: wikipedia-search
sources.note: Search results with snippets. Limit srlimit for TLSN.

sources.name: wikidata-entity
sources.note: Full entity data. Very large for popular items. DAHR only.

sources.name: openlibrary-search
sources.note: Book search. Keep limit low for TLSN.

sources.name: restcountries
sources.note: Compact with field filtering.

sources.name: ipinfo
sources.note: Free tier, no auth for basic lookups.

sources.name: exchangerate-latest
sources.note: Free, no auth. {base} = USD, EUR, etc.

sources.name: yahoo-finance-quote
sources.note: Public endpoint. {symbol} = AAPL, MSFT, ^GSPC, etc.

sources.name: yahoo-finance-spark
sources.note: Intraday spark data. Compact.

sources.name: worldbank-indicator
sources.note: {country} = US, GB, etc. {indicator} = NY.GDP.MKTP.CD, SP.POP.TOTL, etc.

sources.name: fred-series
sources.note: Requires free API key. {series} = DFF (fed funds), CPIAUCSL (CPI), UNRATE, etc.

sources.name: fred-series-info
sources.note: Series metadata only. Very compact.

sources.name: reddit-subreddit-top
sources.note: Public JSON API. No auth for read. Keep limit low for TLSN.

sources.name: reddit-subreddit-new
sources.note: Latest posts. Keep limit low.

sources.name: reddit-search
sources.note: Cross-subreddit search. Limit for TLSN.

sources.name: stackexchange-search
sources.note: Compressed by default. Compact responses.

sources.name: isup-check
sources.note: Returns HTML, not JSON. TLSN works (attests page). Not DAHR-safe.

sources.name: httpstat-test
sources.note: Returns status text. Useful for infra attestation.

sources.name: dns-cloudflare
sources.note: DNS over HTTPS. Set Accept: application/dns-json header.

sources.name: dns-google
sources.note: Google DNS over HTTPS. JSON response.

sources.name: nasa-apod
sources.note: Astronomy Picture of the Day. DEMO_KEY has rate limits.

sources.name: usgs-earthquakes
sources.note: Significant earthquakes in past week. Usually under 16KB.

sources.name: usgs-earthquakes-hour
sources.note: All earthquakes in past hour. Compact.

sources.name: openweather-current
sources.note: Requires free API key. Current conditions.

sources.name: blockchain-info-ticker
sources.note: BTC price in multiple currencies. Very compact.

sources.name: blockchain-info-stats
sources.note: Network stats: hashrate, difficulty, unconfirmed txs.

sources.name: blockstream-block-tip
sources.note: Returns single number — current block height.

sources.name: blockstream-address
sources.note: Address balance and tx count. Compact JSON.

sources.name: mempool-fees
sources.note: Recommended fee rates. Ultra-compact.

sources.name: mempool-mempool
sources.note: Mempool stats: count, vsize, total_fee.

sources.name: etherscan-balance
sources.note: Wei balance for address. Free tier.

sources.name: etherscan-tokentx
sources.note: Recent ERC-20 transfers. Keep offset low for TLSN.

sources.name: alternative-fear-greed
sources.note: Crypto Fear & Greed Index. Ultra-compact.

sources.name: coingecko-trending
sources.note: Top 7 trending coins. Compact response.

sources.name: hn-oil
sources.note: Auto-discovered. Provider: hn-algolia. Relevance: 85/100.

sources.name: hn-prediction
sources.note: Auto-discovered. Provider: hn-algolia. Relevance: 85/100.

sources.name: defillama-dexs
sources.note: DEX volume overview. DAHR only.

sources.name: defillama-stablecoins
sources.note: All stablecoins with market caps. DAHR only.

sources.name: cryptocompare-price
sources.note: Multi-currency price. Ultra-compact. Free tier.

sources.name: cryptocompare-histoday
sources.note: 7-day OHLCV data. Compact.

sources.name: dexscreener-pair
sources.note: DEX pair search. Response varies widely. DAHR safer.

sources.name: dexscreener-token
sources.note: All pairs for a token. Can be large. DAHR preferred.

sources.name: hn-algolia-show
sources.note: Show HN posts. Same hitsPerPage=2 TLSN constraint.

sources.name: hn-algolia-ask
sources.note: Ask HN posts. Same hitsPerPage=2 TLSN constraint.

sources.name: github-commits
sources.note: Recent commits. Keep per_page low for TLSN.

sources.name: producthunt-today
sources.note: Product Hunt feed. Large response. DAHR only.

sources.name: semantic-scholar-search
sources.note: Academic paper search. Compact with field filtering.

sources.name: semantic-scholar-paper
sources.note: Single paper details. {id} can be DOI, arXiv ID, or S2 ID.

sources.name: crossref-works
sources.note: DOI-based publication search. Field-filtered for compactness.

sources.name: core-search
sources.note: Open access papers. Requires free API key in header.

sources.name: pubmed-search
sources.note: Returns PubMed IDs. Combine with efetch for abstracts.

sources.name: pubmed-summary
sources.note: Article summary by PubMed ID.

lifecycle.failureReason: esummary requires specific PMIDs — not available from topic vars at runtime

sources.name: biorxiv-details
sources.note: {date} = YYYY-MM-DD. Returns 3 preprints from that date.

sources.name: openlibrary-work
sources.note: Single work metadata. Compact.

sources.name: restcountries-all
sources.note: All countries. Very large. DAHR only.

sources.name: worldbank-country
sources.note: Country metadata: income level, region, capital.

sources.name: treasury-rates
sources.note: Average interest rates on US Treasury securities.

sources.name: sec-edgar-filings
sources.note: SEC EDGAR full-text search. Public, no auth.

sources.name: sec-edgar-company
sources.note: Full filing history for a company. Pad CIK to 10 digits. DAHR only (large response). Set User-Agent header.

sources.name: bls-series
sources.note: Bureau of Labor Statistics. {series} = CES0000000001 (nonfarm payrolls), CUSR0000SA0 (CPI-U), etc. Free without key (10 requests/day).

sources.name: census-population
sources.note: 2020 Census population by state. No auth.

sources.name: eurostat-data
sources.note: Eurostat datasets. Response varies. DAHR preferred for large datasets.

sources.name: imf-data
sources.note: IMF DataMapper. {indicator} = NGDPD (GDP), PCPIPCH (CPI), etc. Response varies.

sources.name: oecd-data
sources.note: OECD Key Economic Indicators. SDMX format. Requires specific dataset knowledge.

sources.name: ecb-exchange-rates
sources.note: ECB exchange rates. SDMX JSON format.

sources.name: data-gov-datasets
sources.note: US government dataset search. Metadata only.

sources.name: uk-parliament-bills
sources.note: UK Parliament bills search.

sources.name: reddit-subreddit-about
sources.note: Subreddit metadata: subscribers, description, created.

sources.name: stackexchange-tags
sources.note: Tag popularity. Very compact.

sources.name: lobsters-hottest
sources.note: Full hot page. Often exceeds 16KB. DAHR only.

sources.name: lobsters-newest
sources.note: Newest stories. Often exceeds 16KB. DAHR only.

sources.note: ASN info: name, country, prefixes. No auth.

sources.note: IP prefix info. No auth.

sources.name: shodan-host

sources.name: abuseipdb-check

sources.note: Historical weather. Free, no auth.
